description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This Primitive may only be Invoked after the prospective Agent founder meets the prerequisites defined in [A.2.

.3 - Prerequisites For Activating Agent Creation Primitive](9204bcaf-cfec-4f49-a115-31fad73ebd62), resulting in the creation of a Proto-Agent. Invoking the Agent Creation Primitive allows the Proto-Agent to establish its identity by declaring its name, as well as articulate its intended vision, business model or ecosystem goals.
